headline: ATS 2026: Mixed results for Sanofi/Regeneron’s itepekimab cloud COPD prospects
summary: Failure of AERIFY-2 to show clear benefit in COPD places itepekimab on the backfoot against AstraZeneca’s tozorakimab.

raw.headline: ATS 2026: Mixed results for Sanofi/Regeneron’s itepekimab cloud COPD prospects
raw.summary: Failure of AERIFY-2 to show clear benefit in COPD places itepekimab on the backfoot against AstraZeneca’s tozorakimab.

headline: Why Regeneron (REGN) Shares Are Trading Lower Today
summary: Shares of biotech company Regeneron (NASDAQ:REGN) fell 10.5% in the afternoon session after its experimental cancer treatment failed to meet the main goal in a late-stage study for patients with a type of advanced skin cancer.

raw.headline: Why Regeneron (REGN) Shares Are Trading Lower Today

headline: After raising $800M, Parabilis seeks an IPO to pursue ‘undruggable’ targets
summary: Parabilis is teeing up the latest high-profile stock issuance in a year when biotech IPOs are averaging more than $286 million in total proceeds.
